name: Axiom
description: Search Axiom.co datasets using APL queries to cross-correlate IOCs and indicators against forensic event data.

options.name: API Token
options.description: Axiom API Token scoped to your dataset. Recommended over PAT for principle of least privilege. Leave blank if using a Personal Access Token instead.

options.name: Personal Access Token (PAT)
options.description: Axiom Personal Access Token with full account access. Requires Org ID to be set. Leave blank if using an API Token instead.

options.name: Org ID
options.description: Your Axiom organization ID. Required only when using a Personal Access Token (PAT). Found in your Axiom org settings.

options.name: Dataset Name
options.description: The exact name of the Axiom dataset to query (e.g., forensic-events). Must match the dataset name in your Axiom organization.

options.name: Query Start Time
options.description: Optional. ISO 8601 start time for the query window (e.g., 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z). Leave blank to use Axiom's default window.

options.name: Query End Time
options.description: Optional. ISO 8601 end time for the query window (e.g., 2025-05-08T00:00:00Z). Leave blank to default to now.

options.name: APL Query Template
options.description: APL query template. Use {{entity}} as the placeholder for the highlighted value and {{dataset}} for the configured dataset name. Default searches all fields for the entity value.

options.name: Deep Link URL
options.description: Base URL for your Axiom console (e.g., https://app.axiom.co). Used to build the Open in Axiom link in the overlay.
